Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Optimizes the way timestamps are processed in strings for faster performance.
Changed_Other.purpose: Reduces lag when displaying time-related information in the game.

Added_Other.name: FFlagAppChatHideMoreButtonFAE
Added_Other.mechanism: Modifies the chat interface to hide the 'more' button in certain situations.
Added_Other.purpose: Streamlines the chat experience for players, making it cleaner and easier to use.

Added_Other.name: FFlagEnableRefactorAdServiceLogic
Added_Other.mechanism: Updates the logic behind how ads are served in the platform.
Added_Other.purpose: Provides players with more relevant ads, enhancing their experience and engagement.

Added_Security.name: FFlagAXSafeMinMaxPrice
Added_Security.mechanism: Sets safe minimum and maximum price limits for items.
Added_Security.purpose: Ensures players can't set prices that are too low or too high, making transactions fairer.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString

Changed_Other.purpose: Helps developers track changes and updates to the game more efficiently.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Generates a dynamic string that represents a timestamp for flipping data.
Changed_Other.purpose: Allows for better tracking of when certain actions or changes occur in the game.
